title: struct
description: declare the fields in a data structure

messages.description: messages notifying when there are interactions with objects of the structure ('select', 'deselect', 'click', 'displace' and 'change')

arguments.description: template name plus types and names of given fields (array fields also need the array's template name)

body: There should be one "struct" object in each Pd window you are using as a data structure template. The arguments specify the types and names of the fields. For array fields, a third argument specifies the template that the array elements should belong to
